revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - remove "to"
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:No footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | style}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:No footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | style}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:No footnotes]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] }}|preview=Page using [[Template:No footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | style}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --> </noinclude>

{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Fixing my edit mistake that put this category on numerous templates it did not belong on
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = No footnotes | type = style | class = ambox-No_footnotes | style = {{{style|}}} | image = [[File:text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|list of references]], [[Wikipedia:Further reading|related reading]], or [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]], '''but its sources remain unclear because it lacks [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other| }}|preview=Page using [[Template:No footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | style}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages using no footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
